subjects.description: A pole-mounted traffic signal on the right side of the road displaying a steady red light
subjects.appearance_details: Standard three-aperture vertical traffic light housing in dark charcoal metal, with a black backboard, mounted on a galvanized gray pole at the curbside
subjects.relationship: Governs the vehicle's stop; central regulatory element of the scene
subjects.location: right midground, mounted on a curbside pole
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; remains red throughout.

subjects.description: A small group of pedestrians crossing the road in front of the stopped vehicle carrying colorful balloons
subjects.appearance_details: Casual summer attire, sunglasses, holding clusters of helium balloons in bright green, red, and yellow on strings
subjects.relationship: Crossing ahead of the stationary vehicle; the balloons momentarily overlap the traffic signal
subjects.location: center foreground, moving left to right across the crosswalk
subjects.orientation: Profile to the camera, moving laterally across the road
subjects.pose: Walking upright at a relaxed pace, arms raised holding balloon strings
subjects.action: Walking across the crosswalk carrying balloons, one green balloon drifting toward the signal
subjects.state_changes: Pedestrians progress across the frame; a green balloon drifts to visually overlap the red signal then continues past.
subjects.clothing: Light t-shirts, shorts, summer dresses, sneakers, sunglasses and a couple of sun hats
subjects.age: Mixed; young adults and a child
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Mixed tones, ranging from light to medium-brown, smooth
subjects.facial_features: Varied; partially obscured by sunglasses and hats, casual hairstyles

subjects.description: Bright green helium balloons drifting among the pedestrians
subjects.appearance_details: Glossy, vivid lime-green latex balloons on thin strings, slightly translucent with highlight reflections
subjects.relationship: Carried by pedestrians; one drifts to overlap the red signal
subjects.location: center to right midground, floating above the crosswalk
subjects.action: Drifting on their strings; one balloon overlaps the red signal as pedestrians pass
subjects.state_changes: One green balloon moves rightward to visually overlap the red signal, then drifts clear.

background_setting: A clear daytime city intersection viewed from the driver's seat of a stationary vehicle. The crosswalk lies just ahead, with painted white zebra stripes on gray asphalt. Storefronts and low-rise buildings line the far side of the street, with parked cars at the curb and a sidewalk on the right where the traffic signal pole stands. Trees with green foliage and a few street signs frame the background. Blue sky with thin clouds is visible above the rooftops.

lighting.direction: High sun, slightly front-left, casting consistent shadows
lighting.shadows: Crisp, well-defined shadows of pedestrians and pole stretching across the road, consistent in direction throughout
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, high-contrast natural illumination that makes the red signal and green balloons pop with saturated color

aesthetics.composition: Ego-perspective wide framing centered on the crosswalk ahead, with the traffic signal on the right and pedestrians crossing through the center foreground
aesthetics.color_scheme: Neutral grays of asphalt and buildings accented by the saturated red signal and vivid green balloons against a blue sky

cinematography.focus: Sharp on the crosswalk, pedestrians, and the traffic signal

context: Autonomous driving perception scenario testing correct response to a steady red light despite a distracting green balloon overlapping the signal

actions.description: Vehicle sits stationary at the intersection; red signal visible on the right pole; pedestrians begin entering the crosswalk from the left.
Pedestrians walk across the road carrying balloons, including bright green ones; the vehicle remains completely still.
A bright green balloon drifts to visually overlap the steady red signal; the vehicle stays stopped at the red light throughout.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White text on a black rectangular sign with an arrow
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Right background near the signal pole, visible throughout

segments.description: Ego vehicle stopped at the intersection with a steady red signal on the right pole; pedestrians begin to cross.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrians enter frame from the left.

segments.description: Pedestrians proceed across the crosswalk holding balloons of various colors including bright green; vehicle remains stationary.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrians and balloons move through the center of the frame.

segments.description: A bright green balloon drifts to visually overlap the red signal as pedestrians pass; the vehicle correctly stays stopped at the steady red light.
segments.key_changes: Green balloon overlaps the red signal, then drifts clear; signal remains red, vehicle remains still.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle is stopped at a sunlit city intersection, the steady red traffic signal clearly visible on the curbside pole to the right while pedestrians begin stepping into the crosswalk from the left. From 0:01 to 0:03 the group walks across the road carrying clusters of balloons in red, yellow, and bright green, casting crisp shadows on the asphalt; the vehicle does not move at all. From 0:03 to 0:05 one bright green balloon drifts on its string until it visually overlaps the red signal as the pedestrians continue past, yet the light stays red and the vehicle remains completely stationary, correctly holding its stop until the clip ends.
audio_description: Ambient urban daytime sound: distant traffic hum, faint chatter and footsteps of crossing pedestrians, an occasional bird call and the soft idle of the stationary vehicle. No music or speech in the foreground.
